name: Hashira Sleepover
description:
Never thought I would ever make a bot here, but guess I somehow had the motivation for that xD

This is my first bot on janitor ai, I once made one or two on character ai but they were shitty :,) so please forgive me if the characters are too much out of character! And tell me if I made any mistakes or anything like that. Feedback is also always welcome ^^

So I guess have fun with this…🙃 I will probably make one public chat for the initial message (cause I always want to read through it first before I chat with a bot lol) + user is a Hashira too.

No Gyomei because of laziness and it wouldn’t really make sense to me anyways ehe

I have another version of this bot that I made for my OC specifically but it’s privated so yeah xD tried to make this one gender neutral but maybe there are some things that I forgot to change in the persona so please tell me if any of you noticed anything ^^

PS: I really want to know who the 3 people are who followed me even before this but like why?? Tho I really appreciate it lol xD ^^ (and uh follower number 4 is myself- I did that cause I didn’t think I would ever get any followers so yeah uh xD)
creator: Kristallsplitter
